rationale: Feature calls external service (Claude Code CLI via AI SDK) AND requires local domain entities. Chat sessions and messages must be persisted with CollectionPersistable. Chats must be linked to created features/schemas. This is classic Hybrid: external API + local domain modeling + persistence.
correction: Reclassified from service to hybrid: User clarified chat history must be persisted, not ephemeral. Need to map chats to created features. Requires MST domain entities in packages/state-api.
